prompt: 로그인이 필요한 관리자 페이지의 테스트 플랜을 작성해줘
assertions: Uses planner_setup_page to initialize the browser
Explores the login page and attempts authentication flow in the browser
Includes authentication as a prerequisite step in test scenarios
Describes both authorized access and unauthorized/unauthenticated access scenarios
Includes session-related edge cases (expired session, invalid token, or logout)
Saves the plan using planner_save_plan to specs/ directory
